rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CARL U. ZACHRISSON JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: continued to may 3, 2017. no proof of service filed and no declaration filed as of 1:38 p.m. on monday, 4/17/17. as mentioned in the probate examiner notes, the test is not whether a document was uploaded, but whether it was filed. documents in the efiling queue are not viewable and examiners cannot tell if the documents will be accepted for filing. the documents must be accepted by the probate filing clerk before they are deemed filed, are viewable on the ROA, and are reviewable by the probate examiners.
